description: A driver uses a company fuel card to buy fuel. The transaction must be logged and associated with their truck.

nodes.task_description: The system receives a transaction feed from the fuel card provider.

expected_outcome.value: A new fuel purchase transaction is received.

nodes.task_description: The system uses the card number to identify the driver and their assigned truck.

expected_outcome.value: The transaction is linked to the correct driver and vehicle.

nodes.task_description: The system prompts the driver to enter their current odometer reading.

expected_outcome.value: The odometer reading is captured to calculate fuel economy.

nodes.task_description: The fuel purchase (gallons, cost, location) is logged in the system for IFTA and fuel economy reporting.
